item.title: Yamaha RX-V992 5 Channel Stereo Receiver - $50 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice Yamaha RX-V992 receiver. 5 Channels with 80 watts each. Has phono input for turntable and a built in DAC for digital sources. Remote is finicky but does work. Sounds great and is hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Nice receiver in good condition for $50 firm.

item.title: KENWOOD AM-FM STEREO RECEIVER KR-A4040 - $50 (WESTERLY, RI)
item.description: Vintage Kenwood Receiver with built-in AM/FM radio

item.title: SILVER FACE Vintage Scott AM/FM stereo receiver - $75 (Portsmouth)
item.description: Have speakers and can show you that it works can do (AM/FM) don't have anything else to input. So this tests most of the unit...So try it before you buy it. Dial lights and all indicator lights work.... Nice Old School Unit........Located in Portsmouth RI

item.description: new. still in original box. used only once.

item.description: stereo receiver / tuner in excellent working condition. (see photos).

item.description: I don't have speakers to test out the system, but it powers on and everything appears in good condition and working appropriately.

item.description: Very lightly used original parts and excellent condition. Pawtucket, RI 02861. Some are over $1000 on eBay. Cash only.

item.description: White Westinghouse table top stereo cassette recorder

item.title: Shure wireless receiver - $60 (Woonsocket)
item.description: Shure BLX4R H10 542-572MHz Rackmount Wireless Receiver in black.

item.title: Portable Turntable/Record Player - $50 (Woonsocket)
item.description: CR6002A-BK

item.title: Vintage Technics cassette deck player - $40 (Westerly ri)
item.description: From estate I bought

item.title: Vintage Automatic Radio 3 Way Bookshelf Stereo Speakers - $29 (Cranston)
item.description: This is a beautiful pair of Automatic Radio FSA-7888 stereo bookshelf speakers from the 1970's. Excellent condition. Have been recapped (new capacitors in the crossovers) and they sound fantastic. Three way with 8" woofers, 5" midranges and 2" alnico tweeters. They are very efficient and I used them with a low watt tube amplifier with fantastic results but any amplifier or receiver is good. Cabinets are 17 1/2"H x 11 3/8"W x 8 1/2"D. Cool hand twistable, screw type binding posts. I can demonstrate them working at my house. Gorgeous vintage speakers that sound amazing for $29 firm.

item.title: HiFi and Vintage Gear FrankenFest Get Together Sat April 26th - $5 (West Boylston, MA)
item.description: Saturday April 26th, 2025 10AM - 3PM - 12 Church St, West Boylston, MA.

item.title: Scott Stereomaster 222-D Tube Stereo Amplifier - $399 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful Scott Stereomaster222-D tube stereo amplifier with wood case. Working great. All vintage tubes included. Has fresh output tubes from Moscow....all tested and parts replaced that were needed.... it's solid. It works fine with no background noise or hum etc... Controls work quietly. It is hooked up in my garage for demonstration. This is a great sounding vintage amp and is a steal for $399 firm. They sell for around double this price on eBay etc.. No shipping. Cash only.

item.title: Dennon Surround Receiver - $175 (Smithfield)
item.description: Dennon Surround Receiver with remote like new. $175

item.title: FOR SALE: MICRO SEIKI DD-40 TURNTABLE - $1,600
item.description: Up for sale one Micro Seiki DD-40 turntable in nice condition with original box and manual. Also, in good condition original dust cover, 45-RPM adapter and removable headshell. Comes with Ortofon VMS-30 cartridge. The plinth is rosewood veneer in excellent condition. I am the original owner purchased new in 1977. The turntable is 43 years old and has been sitting in the original box for over 15 years. There is a couple of small cracks near the dust cover hinges (see images). From a smoke free home. The turntable is sold as is per my description NO RETURNS.

item.title: Boston Acoustics CR6 Compact Stereo Speakers - $50 (Cranston)
item.description: Great sounding small bookshelf speakers. Boston CR6. Good condition with some slight imperfections (see pics) They present well from a few feet away. They are hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Very nice speakers for the money at $50 firm.

item.title: Sony Cassette/Radio vintage model cfs -720 - $30 (Warwick)
item.description: Vintage Sony model cfs - 720 , detachable speakers. 30$ firm

item.title: Pioneer Receiver - $75 (Greenville)
item.description: Pioneer Receiver. Clean. Works 100%. New remote from Amazon

item.title: Denon Receiver - $200
item.description: Denon Home Theater Receiver. Not much use on it, used it as a 2nd system in the house. Plenty of HDMI ports, My man cave has recently been turned into a kids playroom so no need for this anymore. Will sell for $200

item.title: Sony turntable - $100 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: The Sony PS-LX300USB Turntable will let you make use of a record collection that is simply gathering dust. The Sound Forge system offers both silent and listening digitizing of songs. With this fully automatic turntable anybody can transfer the music from vinyl records to a digitally formatted file in moments. 1Connecting the included USB output cable to any compatible PC or notebook allows the included Audio Studio software to save the recording accurately in a digital format that is compatible with most modern stereos and portable music systems. In addition to the USB type of audio output the Sony PS-LX300USB also offers RCA output. You can connect it to any of your home theater speakers stereos receivers or amplifiers. It also works with your video player so you can enjoy a full entertainment experience in your home. This flexibility allows you to use the turntable for listening to music from its original vinyl format.The turntable's stylus offers durable construction that will not

item.title: Sony turntable - $100 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: used, but in perfect working order. stylus is less than 200 hours on it. Automatic direct drive.

item.title: Turntable to transfer vinyl to USB price reduced - $30 (Tiverton)
item.description: Brand new with built in speakers

item.title: Vintage Pioneer PL-41 turntable - $270 (Ashaway)
item.description: Very clean and operable vintage Pioneer PL-41 turntable. New stylus, new thrust bearing (a common replacement item over the life of this model.) Google reviews online. Condition of this unit is 9 out 10. Wooden plinth is awesome - and great looking vintage design item. Dust cover holds open with the designed `kick stand.' Audio output cables still have original Japanese paper labels! I also have a paper copy of the operator manual.

item.title: Vintage mint Sansui QR-6500 receiver (Johnston)
item.description: Mint condition. In the original box. 280 watt control amplifier am/fm multiplex stereo tuna 1970's Quadraphonic Receiver.

item.title: Teac R550USB cd-r, turntable cassette - $100 (Cranston)
item.description: Teac R550USB transfer records,cd and cassettes to computer or record cassettes and records directly to the built in CD-R. Some marks on top cover otherwise excellent.You'll need to download the manual. These were $600 new.Thanks for looking.

item.title: Towing Hitch Receiver With Weights - $195 (Johnston)
item.description: Towing hitch receiver with weights

item.title: Onkyo stereo reciever & Polk speakers - $150 (Lincoln)
item.description: 5.1 onkyo receiver and bookshelf speakers, everything's works great, I upgraded my setup and no longer need these.

item.title: Canon Pro-10 Wide Format Printer & Gemini Turntable - $300 (Middletown)
item.description: For sale - Canon Pro-10 wide format photo printer, maximum paper size 13"x19". Produces archival quality prints, Turn your photos into works of art. Vibrant color gamut, faithful reproduction of images. I used it mostly for black and white and found the results to be excellent. Full disclosure - this is an older model and has been in storage for a while, I have not fired it up in a couple of years. There is a chance that the print heads could be clogged but that is to be expected from any printer not used on a regular basis. Does not include ink or new packs of paper, but I will throw in a few sheets of 13x19 luster finish paper from another pack. It would not be difficult to get this printer going again, but I expect any potential buyer to know a thing or two about photo printing ahead of time, or be ready to dedicate yourself to learning a few things. These printers are geared more toward professionals, or knowledgeable amateurs. That said, if you are just getting into photo printing it

item.title: Ibanez Artcore AS-53 & 2 Amps, Gemini Turntable - $325 (Middletown)
item.description: For sale - Ibanez AS-53 thinline acoustic electric guitar. Nice action, has that unique hollowbody Telecasterish twang. Good for jazzy & surf type sounds, or to crank up the crunch if you like. About a year old, like new. Transparent black finish. Also Orange Crush 12 practice amp, like new, and an older Line 6 Spider II 15 w practice amp. Purchased over ten years ago but has been mostly sitting in storage like everything else, still works great. Asking $250 for the Ibanez, $75 for the Orange, $60 for the Line 6. $325 takes it all, will throw in a free gig bag and power cord.

item.title: Wireless Speaker Kit - $25 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: Experience high-quality audio with the RocketFish RF-WHTIB-A Wireless Rear Speaker Kit. They seem to work fine and are in very good vintage condition. Hard to find, would be great to spice up any sound system or excellent for the collector. See vintage write-up below.

item.title: Vintage Radio Shack / Realistic / Micronta Hoard - $150 (Wrentham)
item.description: This is all stuff that I've used at some point in my distant past. Everything is branded as indicated. It is all at least 35 years old and everything works except the 12" speakers. Included in the lot:

item.title: Vintage Audio Denon DRA-300 - $75
item.description: The Denon DRA-300 is a moderately powered, moderately priced stereo receiver with digital-synthesis tuning for both the AM and FM bands. Its audio amplifier section is rated to deliver 33 watts per channel into 8-ohm loads from 20 to 20,000 Hz with no more than 0.05 per cent total harmonic distortion. According to Denon, the power amplifiers employ a "non-switching" variable-bias circuit that reduces high-frequency distortion.

item.title: Cambridge Soundworks Stereo Surround Sound Speakers in Great Condition - $60 (Cumberland)
item.description: Cambridge soundworks stereo speakers in great working condition. Small size and fantastic sound. Easily wall mounted.

item.title: Vintage Radio Shack ProX44AV Stereo Bookshelf Speakers - $50 (Cumberland)
item.description: These are the Next Generation of the speakers that started a HIFI revolution in miniaturization measuring just 5*5*8 approximately. Metal cabinets with a rear port and a metal grill made for either Automotive or Home purposes, huge sound in a small ported cabinet made of solid metal, virtually indestructible and incredible sound.

item.title: Vintage Vector Research Stereo Graphic Equalizer in Great Working Cond - $60 (Lincoln)
item.description: I am selling a vintage Vector Research Stereo Graphic Equalizer in Great working condition. Various inputs and outputs, no issues works great exactly as pictured.

item.title: Bose Model 100 Indoor Outdoor Stereo Speakers Work Great - $100 (Cumberland)
item.description: Selling a pair of Bose model 100 stereo speakers in white. They work great, the compact size produces an unbelievably large sound. Great Speakers when space could be an issue.

item.title: Onkyo TX-SR605 7 Channel Surround Sound Receiver - $60 (Attleboro) - $60 (Cumberland)
item.description: Selling my Onkyo 7 Channel surround sound receiver. 7.1 Surround Sound at 90 Watts Per Channel for a total of 630 Watts of Stereo Surround Sound. Switches HDM, Subwoofer outputs,Some button caps are missing but Everything seems to work ok.

item.title: Sony AM/FM CD Cassette Player BOOMBOX - $50 (Cumberland)
item.description: Selling A vintage Sony AM/FM stereo, cd, Cassette Player, Boombox. Works great, all aspects of it have been tested and function perfectly. Analog Radio with built in Antenna picks up those difficult Radio Stations with ease. No AC cord but it looks like one that should be readily available . Boombox works perfectly on 6D batteries which are included.

item.title: Pioneer Surround Sound Receiver 500 Watts Great Condition - $100 (Cumberland)
item.description: Selling a nice vintage pioneer VSX D457 surround sound receiver. It is in great condition both aesthetically and functionality. The receiver has Dolby pro logic surround sound and a subwoofer output, as well as a great FM Tuner section that easily pulls hard to gas stations. Inputs include two tape decks, a phono input, CD, DVD, TV, and many others. It is has 500 Watt output into 5 channels. Condition is exactly as its pictured

item.title: Vintage KLH 3 Way Stereo Speakers Black in Great Condition - $60 (Cumberland)
item.description: As pictured

item.title: Vintage Lafayette Analog Solid State Stereo Table Radio - $60 (Attleboro)
item.description: Vintage Lafayette AM/FM Table Radio in good working condition. Wooden Cabinet Exactly as pictured, has RCA inputs in the back for a tape/aux input as well as a Phono Input. Analog Tuner pulls in hard to get stations way better than the newer digital ones.

item.description: this is far from new but its in great condition and runs excellent, has a opposed twin cylinder 16hp no drips, no smoke, no knocks, has a 5 speed manual transmission shifts and works fine, and a new seat, a 38 inch mower deck that works fine but may need a idler pulley kind of noisy but still works good and it has a electric pto for deck, has headlights that work perfect, also has a trailer hitch receiver on back as seen in photo. also comes with a gravel/ snow plow ..$525.00 or obro interested or have questions call [39]show contact info or email please leave message if i dont pick up hard of hearing thank you.. delivery is possible for a fee thanks

item.title: Universal Audio UAD-2 Duo and Quad PCIe Cards with Extra Plugins - $1,000 (North Providence)
item.description: I'm selling two of my UAD PCIe DSP accelerator cards. One is a Quad, and the other is a Duo. Combined, they give you up to 6 SHARC chips for performing plugin processing with your Universal Audio system. I used these on a Windows system along with my UA Apollo and an Octo.

item.title: Vintage Fisher Price Record Player Model 835 - $50 (Attleboro Falls)
item.description: Complete set with turntable and speakers. The dust cover lowers and raises the arm. Plays but the sound quality is not good because it most likely needs a new needle. Housing is in very good condition. Some scratches on the dust cover. I believe the manufacturer's date is 1983. Cash sale. Pickup in North Attleboro.

item.title: 2016 HARLEY DAVIDSON ROAD GLIDE ULTRA - $18,999 (Portsmouth RI)
item.description: 2016 Harley Davidson Road Glide Ultra, only 12,300 miles. Original owner. Garaged, covered. All services done at Harley Davidson. Additional items. Screaming Eagle high flow ventilation air cleaner, driver back rest, highway pegs, chrome passenger footrest covers, rear tire replace at 9096 miles, lithium battery installed at 10547 miles, Screaming Eagle muffler, end caps and stage one tuning kit. Additional negotiable items. Full face HD helmet, two women's half helmets in excellent condition, lithium battery charger, two men's HD riding jackets. Premium HD stereo helmet headset. HD full helmet music and communication headset, HD motorcycle cover, bladder suspension pump. Kelly Blue book lists at $21,100.

item.title: Home Theater/Music Room, Onkyo, Polk RTI, JBL, Stands, Wiring - $1,200 (Cumberland)
item.description: $1200 for everything. I have a complete hi-fi home theater or music room set that comes with everything you need. All Polk speakers come in a Cherry Wood finish which all are in fantastic shape. Speakers are in like new condition. All come with grills in like new condition. Receiver 100% works and in great shape. All speaker stands filled 50% with sand to weigh down and sound deaden. Music and movies sound great! Have boxes for the floor speakers and subs. Also have the foam for the bookshelf speakers to assist with transporting the equipment safely.

item.description: Big Sale 30% to 50% off items guitars, organs, drums, congas, guitar amplifiers, guitar pedals,microphones, speakers, receivers and much more for musicians churches, schools and others, prices are negotiable. Location Music house in Big Top Flea Market, open 9 to 5 p.m. Saturday and Sunday.

item.title: Anthem Receiver, Samsung DVD, Universal Remote, & More - $250 (Norton, MA)
item.description: Our TV popped we decided to upgrade the whole system. So I'm looking to unload all the old components that we did not use in the new setup. These all work and were in use till last week. Here's what I have...

item.title: Reloop RP-8000 MK2 Turntable w/ Reloop Elite Mixer - $1,999 (Providence)
item.description: (2) Reloop RP-8000 MK2 Advanced Hybrid DJ Turntable Instrument (Brand new in original box)
